title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.777 - US Navy FA Paul Akers Jr Memorial Bridge designated for a bridge on State Highway 17 in Pulaski County
text:
227.777.  US Navy FA Paul Akers Jr Memorial Bridge designated for a bridge on State Highway 17 in Pulaski County. — The bridge on State Highway 17 crossing over the BSNF Railroad south of the city of Crocker in Pulaski County shall be designated as "US Navy FA Paul Akers Jr Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such bridge, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2021 S.B. 258)
